title: T1: CLI‚ÜíSkill sentinel hand-off (init‚Üíimport bridge)
scope: packages/cli (init command + SessionStart hook + Stop hook) + packages/server (fabric-import Skill)
description: Decouple 'user installed fabric (terminal)' from 'Agent loads import skill (AI client)' across the surface boundary. `fabric init` ends with `clack.confirm` '‰∏ãÊ¨°ÂºÄ AI Êó∂ËÆ©Êàë‰ªé git log ÊäΩÊõ¥Â§öÁü•ËØÜÂêó?' ‚Üí on Y answer writes `.fabric/.import-requested` sentinel file. Both `knowledge-hint-broad.cjs` (SessionStart) AND `fabric-hint.cjs` (Stop) read the sentinel; when present, unconditionally recommend `fabric-import` skill regardless of cooldown / underseed-threshold. fabric-import Skill clears the sentinel on completion.

files.change: add clack.confirm prompt at end of init flow; on Y response, write empty `.fabric/.import-requested` sentinel file and print '‰∏ãÊ¨°ÂºÄ AI ‰ºöÁúãÂà∞ÊèêÁ§∫' confirmation
before existing underseed-threshold gate, check `.fabric/.import-requested` existence; if present ‚Üí emit stderr banner recommending `/fabric-import` and exit; bypass all cooldown checks
before existing Signal C cooldown check, mirror sentinel-read logic from SessionStart hook; if present ‚Üí output JSON signal=import with recommended_skill=fabric-import regardless of cooldown
add Phase 3.5 (post-completion) step: `rm -f .fabric/.import-requested` to clear sentinel; document sentinel contract in Phase 0
add sentinel lifecycle check: init Y-confirm writes file, SessionStart/Stop read file, import Skill completion removes file

implementation: Read existing init.ts clack.confirm patterns to match style; add new prompt step after scan completion
Implement sentinel write helper (single line: ensure .fabric exists, write empty file, no error if already exists)
Update both hooks with identical sentinel-read priority gate (sentinel present ‚Üí recommend import + early-return); place BEFORE existing cooldown/threshold checks
Update fabric-import SKILL.md Phase contract: read sentinel in Phase 0 (informational only ‚Äî proceed regardless), remove sentinel as final step of Phase 3
Add coverage gate test: simulate init Y ‚Üí assert sentinel exists; simulate SessionStart ‚Üí assert stderr contains 'fabric-import'; simulate import Skill completion ‚Üí assert sentinel removed

reference.pattern: Existing sentinel-style files in `.fabric/.cache/` (e.g., sessionstart-last-hash from T8 surface); existing clack prompts in init.ts
reference.examples: Sentinel files: empty content, presence-as-signal; cleanup is responsibility of the consumer

criteria: GIVEN fresh repo with no `.fabric/.import-requested` WHEN user runs `fabric init` and answers Y to the AI-import confirm THEN `.fabric/.import-requested` exists as an empty file

GIVEN sentinel file exists WHEN SessionStart hook runs (Claude Code / Cursor / Codex CLI) THEN stderr contains a banner recommending `/fabric-import` regardless of canonical-node-count or 24h cooldown
GIVEN sentinel file exists WHEN Stop hook (`fabric-hint.cjs`) runs THEN JSON output contains `signal: 'import'` and `recommended_skill: 'fabric-import'`
GIVEN fabric-import Skill ran to completion WHEN any subsequent SessionStart fires THEN `.fabric/.import-requested` no longer exists AND import is no longer unconditionally recommended

rationale.chosen_approach: Empty sentinel file as cross-surface signal ‚Äî presence-as-data, simplest possible IPC between CLI terminal session and AI-client session
decision_factors: Crosses surface boundary (terminal CLI vs AI Skill) so events.jsonl is wrong primitive
Underseed threshold misses users with existing baseline knowledge who still want import
Empty file is git-ignorable, atomic, zero-parse-cost
rationale.tradeoffs: Sentinel can become orphaned if user runs init then never opens AI client ‚Äî accepted, no harm done

manual_checks: Fresh repo: fabric init ‚Üí Y ‚Üí open Claude Code ‚Üí verify banner appears
Verify in Cursor and Codex CLI
Run fabric-import Skill ‚Üí verify sentinel cleared on next SessionStart
success_metrics: Sentinel file created in ‚â§1 second after Y confirm
Banner appears in 100% of SessionStart runs when sentinel present
unit: init.ts: sentinel-write helper writes empty file at correct path
knowledge-hint-broad.cjs: sentinel-priority branch emits expected banner
integration: End-to-end: init Y ‚Üí mock SessionStart ‚Üí mock import Skill completion ‚Üí assert lifecycle
